items.title: Merck scraps a Phase 2 Alzheimer's asset from partner Neuphoria
items.description:
Merck has axed a Phase 2 trial testing an experimental Alzheimer’s medicine, Endpoints News has learned.

 The company terminated a mid-stage test of the oral drug candidate MK-1167, a Merck spokesperson ...

items.title: Sanofi’s Lumizyme successor passes Phase 3 test in babies with Pompe disease
items.description:
Sanofi said its enzyme replacement therapy succeeded in a registrational trial in a severe form of Pompe disease, paving the way for a key label expansion in the US.

items.title: BeOne’s Brukinsa succeeds in frontline mantle cell lymphoma study
items.description:
BeOne Medicines said its BTK inhibitor Brukinsa cut the risk of disease progression or death by 43% compared to chemoimmunotherapy when used as a first option for mantle cell lymphoma patients.

 The Phase 3 study ...

items.title: STAT+: FDA approves Orca Bio’s T cell therapy for blood cancer patients
items.description: The FDA approved a T-cell therapy from Orca Bio that reduces the risk of a debilitating immune reaction in patients with blood cancers undergoing stem cell transplants.
